meta.release_notes:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [3.0.0] - 2025-06-23

### Added

- added field `resolvingMeasureDescription`

### Changed

- `sourceNotificationId`:
  - renamed to `sourceNotificationId` and elaborated semantics
  - now is mandatory
- `relatedNotificationId`:
  - changed to be a collection (`relatedNotificationIds`)
  - added logic when a notification can be considered a related notification
- `leadingRootCauseEnumeration`: added `insolvency`
- Introduce a Set of Material Entities with `materialNumberCustomer`, `materialNumberSupplier` and `materialGlobalAssetId`
  - `materialNumberSupplier` and `materialNumberCustomer` use the `PartIdCharacterstic` from `PartTypeInformation`
  - `materialGlobalAssetId` uses the UUID characteristic directly
- `text`:
  - enhanced semantics to inform about information to set and rules.
    - MUST be set during creation, update and forwarding
    - CAN be set during resolving

### Removed

## [2.0.0] - 2024-03-11

### Added

- notificationId: mandatory id for notifications
- relatedNotificationId: optional id to refer to a notification along the tiers

### Changed

- relatedSourceMessageId: renamed to sourceNotificationId and reframed semantics
- preferredName of TextLengthConstraint was CamelCase

### Removed


## [1.0.0] - 2024-02-19
### Added
- initial model

nodes.label: DemandAndCapacityNotification
nodes.description: This aspect model defines the standard for demand and capacity notification exchange between business partners. Demand and Capacity Notifications refer to specific events within the supply chain which affect production or demand.

nodes.label: affectedSitesSender
nodes.description: The affected Business Partner Site Numbers of the sender of the notification. It is RECOMMENDED to set this property.

nodes.label: affectedSitesRecipient
nodes.description: The affected Business Partner Site Numbers of the recipient of the notification. It is RECOMMENDED to set this property. It MUST NOT contain any BPNS that doesn't belong to the receiver.

nodes.label: leadingRootCause
nodes.description: The main cause that has or may have an impact on the supply of goods.

nodes.label: effect
nodes.description: Effect or impact on the supply of goods as a consequence mentioned in the leadingRootCause. From business perspective demand/capacity reduction are most relevant values in connection with mentioned root causes. For technical completeness demand/capacity increase are also added to the enumeration.

nodes.label: text
nodes.description: Free text description for notification (max. 4000 characters).

nodes.label: materialGlobalAssetId
nodes.preferredName: UUID of the Part Type Twin
nodes.description: Identifier used uniquely to identify part type twin.

nodes.label: startDateOfEffect
nodes.description: This property defines the start date and time of the effect regardless of the time the notification was sent.

nodes.label: expectedEndDateOfEffect
nodes.description: Expected end date of the impact MAY be defined by the sender of the notification.

nodes.label: status
nodes.description: Status "open" should be used in the context of an effect which remains active. Status "resolved" should be used to inform the partner that the effect of the initial notification stopped or has been resolved.

nodes.label: contentChangedAt
nodes.description: The timestamp of the latest change of this notification. Date and time are set according to a timezone.

nodes.label: relatedSourceMessageId
nodes.description: Unique ID identifying the source message that started the notification thread.

nodes.label: materialNumberSupplier
nodes.description: Material identifiers as assigned by the supplier or manufacturer. This property identifies the material in the supplier's database. If the supplier is the data provider, sending this property is RECOMMENDED.

nodes.label: materialNumberCustomer
nodes.description: Material identifier as assigned by the customer. This property identifies the material in the customer's database. For standard materials (e.g. screws) for which a customer does not have an own ID, the manufacturer material ID should be set in this field, too. If the customer is the data provider, sending this property is RECOMMENDED.

nodes.label: AffectedSitesCharacteristic
nodes.description: A set of Business Partner Number Sites (BPNS) that are affected.

nodes.label: MaterialNumberDigitalTwinCharacteristic
nodes.description: A set of Digital Twin material numbers.

nodes.label: MaterialNumberSet
nodes.description: The set of material numbers, usually a multi-character string assigned by an ERP system of the customer or the supplier.

nodes.label: LeadingRootCauseEnumeration
nodes.description: Enumeration of the available leading root causes.

nodes.label: EffectEnumeration
nodes.description: Enumeration of the available effects due to the mentioned leadingRootCause.

nodes.label: StatusEnumeration
nodes.description: Status can be either "open" or "resolved".

nodes.label: UserInputTrait
nodes.description: Trait to ensure correct values for the user input.

nodes.label: UserInputCharacteristic
nodes.description: User input can be any string that is max. 4000 characters.

nodes.label: TextLengthConstraint
nodes.description: Constraint for a string to be max. 4000 characters long.
